title: Mohabbat Isko Kahete Hain
actors: Nanda Karnataki, Shashi Kapoor, Ramesh Deo
plot: Vijay and Rajni have been childhood sweethearts in a small town called Rajgarh. They did separate for a few years when Rajni and her maternal grandma, Leela, went to live in Calcutta. When Rajni returns, fully matured, both rekind...
